Job Title: Service Manager

Job Summary: We are seeking an experienced and customer-focused Service Manager with 5+ years in IT Service Management, Technical Account Management, or Post-Sales Service Delivery. The role involves managing the post-sales customer lifecycle, ensuring SLA compliance, operational governance, and continuous service improvement. Collaboration with technical, finance, and business teams is essential in a SaaS, CPaaS, Telecom, Cloud Communications, or IT Solutions environment.

Key Responsibilities:

  1. Contract Handover & Service Governance
  2. Participate in contract handover meetings with Business Development and Sales teams.
  3. Review contracts, SOWs, and SLAs to define service scope and governance processes.
  4. Identify stakeholders and establish escalation procedures.

  5. Prepare Account Service Plans and Service Management Runbooks.

  6. Customer Onboarding & Service Configuration

  7. Conduct kick-off meetings and define communication protocols.
  8. Coordinate feasibility assessments and resource planning.
  9. Develop Service Registers, SOPs, and Knowledge Base documentation.
  10. Train customers on ITSM ticketing processes.

  11. Validate system configurations, monitoring tools, and security compliance with technical teams.

  12. Service Delivery & Operations

  13. Convert SLAs into internal OLAs and manage releases/maintenance.
  14. Oversee Incident, Problem, and Change Management processes.

  15. Ensure RCA documentation post-major incidents.

  16. Performance Monitoring & Continuous Improvement

  17. Monitor service availability, SLA compliance, and operational performance.
  18. Conduct Weekly Operational Reviews and Monthly Service Reviews.
  19. Track improvements via CSI registers and dashboards.

  20. Collaborate with Finance teams for billing accuracy and payment collections.

  21. Customer Relationship & Business Growth

  22. Build long-term relationships and act as a trusted advisor.
  23. Drive adoption of self-service platforms and automation.
  24. Identify upselling/cross-selling opportunities and support contract renewals.

Qualifications & Skills: - Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, or Business Administration. - 5+ years in IT Service Management, Technical Account Management, or Post-Sales Service Delivery. - Strong ITIL Framework knowledge (Incident, Problem, Change, SLA, CSI). - Experience in SaaS, CPaaS, Telecom, Cloud Communications, or IT Solutions industries. - Hands-on experience with ITSM tools, SLA management, and operational reporting. - Knowledge of monitoring platforms, automation tools, and system integrations. - Analytical, documentation, and problem-solving skills. - Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and customer relationship abilities.

Preferred Candidate: - Enterprise customer account management experience. - ITIL Foundation Certification or higher. - Proven SLA compliance and customer satisfaction improvement. - Automation/digital transformation and CSI initiative experience. - Commercial understanding of billing validation, revenue assurance, and contract governance. - Ability to identify customer growth opportunities.

Employment Details: - Location: Kochi - Department: Service Management - Joining: Immediate Joiners Preferred

How to Apply: - Call or WhatsApp: 75938 33665 - Email: recruitment@nesasoftware.com

If this aligns with your career goals, share your resume at recruitment@nesasoftware.com.

  • Troubleshoot database connectivity, performance, and replication issues.
  • Ensure high availability, disaster recovery, and data integrity.
  • Work with databases such as PostgreSQL / MySQL / SQL Server / Oracle.

DevOps & CI/CD

  • Design, create, and maintain CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins and Azure DevOps Pipelines.
  • Automate application build, test, and deployment workflows.
  • Integrate Git branching strategies and deployment pipelines.

Kubernetes & Deployment Automation

  • Use Argo CD for GitOps-based application deployments.
  • Create and manage Kubernetes resources: Deployments, StatefulSets, Services, ConfigMaps, Secrets, Jobs/CronJobs, Ingress.
  • Monitor cluster health and troubleshoot deployment issues.
  • Work with Helm charts (preferred).

Containerization

  • Write and optimize Dockerfiles for application and service deployments.
  • Build and manage Docker images.
  • Handle image tagging, versioning, and registry management.
  • Troubleshoot container runtime issues.

Monitoring & Observability

  • Set up and manage monitoring solutions using Grafana and Prometheus.
  • Create dashboards for infrastructure, application, and database monitoring.
  • Configure alerts and troubleshoot performance bottlenecks.
  • Monitor API, database, and infrastructure health.

Scripting & Automation

  • Develop automation scripts using Python, PowerShell, and Bash/Shell scripting.
  • Automate repetitive operational and deployment tasks.
  • Create scripts for database maintenance, health checks, and deployments.

Agile / Process Management

  • Work in Agile/Scrum methodology.
  • Use Azure DevOps / Jira for sprint planning, task tracking, and release coordination.
  • Collaborate with development, QA, infrastructure, and support teams.

Required Skills

  • Experience in Database Administration (Backup, Restore, Replication, HA, Performance Tuning)
  • Jenkins Pipeline creation and troubleshooting
  • Git version control and branching strategies
  • Docker & Kubernetes
  • Argo CD / GitOps deployment
  • Azure DevOps Pipelines
  • Grafana & Prometheus
  • Linux Administration
  • Scripting (Python / PowerShell / Bash)
  • CI/CD best practices
  • Troubleshooting production issues
  • Cloud infrastructure basics
  • Monitoring & alerting tools

Preferred Skills

  • Experience required: 3-5 years
  • Experience with Terraform or Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
  • Knowledge of disaster recovery and high availability design
  • Experience in microservices architecture
  • Knowledge of networking concepts (DNS, Load Balancers, Reverse Proxy)
  • Exposure to security best practices (Secrets management, RBAC)
  • Experience with log monitoring tools (ELK / Loki)
  • Knowledge of GitOps workflows

Soft Skills

  • Strong problem-solving ability
  • Ownership mindset
  • Cross-functional collaboration
  • Good communication skills
  • Ability to handle production-critical issues
  • Documentation and process improvement mindset
